queries.question: For every bed and breakfast, show me the types and prices of rooms
queries.sql: select bed_and_breakfast.name , rooms.room_type , rooms.price from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?room_type ?price WHERE {
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms a :Bed_and_breakfast_rooms .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?bed_and_breakfast a :Bed_and_breakfast .
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms p:hasBed_and_breakfast ?bed_and_breakfast .
  ?bed_and_breakfast p:name ?name .
  ?rooms p:room_type ?room_type .
  ?rooms p:price ?price .
}

queries.question: What are the room types for every B&B listed?
queries.sql: SELECT Rooms.room_type  from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id   GROUP BY Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bed_and_breakfast)

queries.question: What are the room types for every B&B listed?
queries.sql: select bed_and_breakfast.name , rooms.room_type from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id

queries.question: For every bed and breakfast, list the pricing of rooms they have.
queries.sql: select bed_and_breakfast.name , rooms.price from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?price WHERE {
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms a :Bed_and_breakfast_rooms .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?bed_and_breakfast a :Bed_and_breakfast .
  ?bed_and_breakfast_rooms p:hasBed_and_breakfast ?bed_and_breakfast .
  ?bed_and_breakfast p:name ?name .
  ?rooms p:price ?price .
}

queries.question: Give me the price of rooms each bed and breakfast has.
queries.sql: SELECT Rooms.price  from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id   GROUP BY Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bed_and_breakfast)

queries.question: What room type and price is common to all bed and breakfasts?
queries.sql: SELECT Rooms.room_type, Rooms.price  from Bed_and_breakfast_rooms join Rooms on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id = Rooms.room_type join Bed_and_breakfast on Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id = Bed_and_breakfast.id   GROUP BY Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bed_and_breakfast_rooms.bed_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bed_and_breakfast)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What room type and price do we have for every bed and breakfast
What are the room types for every B&B listed?
Give me the price of rooms each bed and breakfast has.
